title: ambulia fragrans
intro: Ambulia fragrans, also known as Justicia adhatoda, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The leaves and flowers of Ambulia fragrans have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ambulia fragrans include its ability to reduce coughing, ease chest congestion, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are often made into tea, powder, or oil extracts, which can be taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
